description: A Web Accessibility Specialist needs to configure Chrome for WCAG audits. Organize the 22 bookmarks on the bookmark bar into five folders: 'Standards & Guidelines', 'Evaluation Tools', 'Assistive Tech', 'ARIA & Patterns', and 'Personal'. Set the default font size to 24 and the minimum font size to 18. Configure the browser flags to enable 'Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents', disable 'Smooth Scrolling', and enable 'Experimental Web Platform features'. Create custom search engine shortcuts 'wcag' for w3.org and 'mdn' for developer.mozilla.org. Set the download directory to '~/Documents/WCAG_Audits', enable the option to ask where to save each file before downloading, and block third-party cookies.
